required_binding: counter_source_id binds collector_id, topology_id, measurement_run_id, tenant_id, and security_context_id
byte counters share topology_id, schema_version, object_id, and measurement_run_id with bundle lineage
latency counters bind to topology_version and collector_firmware_identity
security stream binds tenant_id and security_context_id to the same measurement_run_id
